channel.title: Notes - Terry Chen
channel.description: Domains, questions, and small bets I'm actively thinking through.

image.title: Terry Chen
image.description: Hi, this is Terry. I'm documenting my product ideas and learning notes in this blog. I'm interested in creating new user experiences through generative ai, focusing on synthesized content generation and actionable insight extraction.

item.title: AI Application & Value Creation Layer
item.author: Terry Chen (Terry Chen)
item.description: Investment opportunities in AI application companies building on foundation model infrastructure.
item.dc:creator: Terry Chen

item.title: Security, Data Pipelines & Agentic SOC
item.author: Terry Chen (Terry Chen)
item.description: Enterprise security solutions, data infrastructure, and AI-powered security operations centers.
item.dc:creator: Terry Chen

item.title: Structural Repricing of Asia Tech
item.author: Terry Chen (Terry Chen)
item.description: Value opportunities in structurally mispriced Asian technology companies.
item.dc:creator: Terry Chen

item.title: Mobility, Energy, and New Infrastructure
item.author: Terry Chen (Terry Chen)
item.description: Transportation, energy transition, and infrastructure transformation investments.
item.dc:creator: Terry Chen

item.title: Consumer Experience & Aesthetic Economy
item.author: Terry Chen (Terry Chen)
item.description: Consumer brands focused on experience, aesthetics, and lifestyle enhancement.

item.title: Crypto
item.author: Terry Chen (Terry Chen)
item.description: Decentralized finance protocols, digital assets, and the infrastructure powering the crypto economy.
